meta.title: DigiByte — Faster, Safer, Forward-thinking Blockchain | DGB · DigiAssets · Digi-ID
meta.description: DigiByte is the longest, fastest, most decentralized UTXO blockchain. Build with DigiAssets, sign in with Digi-ID, run a node, and join a global open-source community.
meta.og.title: DigiByte — Faster, Safer, Forward-thinking Blockchain
meta.og.description: The longest, fastest, most decentralized UTXO blockchain. Build with DigiAssets, sign in with Digi-ID.
meta.twitter.title: DigiByte — Faster, Safer, Forward-thinking Blockchain
meta.twitter.description: The longest, fastest, most decentralized UTXO blockchain. Build, transact and authenticate on DGB.
hero.title: Engineered for continuous operation.
hero.lead: DigiByte is a highly secure, multi-algorithm UTXO blockchain built for scale. Operating with 15-second block times and a twelve-year history of uninterrupted uptime, the network provides a battle-tested foundation for DGB, DigiAssets, decentralized Digi-ID authentication, and — very soon — DigiDollar.
trust.label: Available across the ecosystem
features.title: Engineered for the next decade of crypto.
features.lead: A pure proof-of-work UTXO chain that has shipped industry firsts since 2014 — DigiShield, MultiAlgo, SegWit, Odocrypt, Dandelion++, DigiAssets and Digi-ID.
features.blockTime.title: 15-second blocks, settled fast.
features.blockTime.body: 40× faster than Bitcoin and 10× faster than Litecoin. Fifteen-second confirmations mean point-of-sale payments, exchange deposits and asset transfers all finalize in the time it takes to read this sentence — without the contention or fee spikes of slower chains.
features.consensus.title: Five mining algorithms in parallel.
features.consensus.body: DigiByte secures blocks through five independent proof-of-work algorithms — SHA-256d, Scrypt, Skein, Qubit and Odocrypt. Each one targets a different mining ecosystem (CPU, GPU, FPGA, ASIC) and Odocrypt re-randomizes itself every 10 days to keep ASIC dominance off the table. Attacking the chain means attacking five algorithms at once.
features.supply.title: Hard-capped, scarce by design.
features.supply.body: DGB is mathematically limited to 21 billion coins, emitted on a transparent monthly-reduction schedule. No dev tax, no governance unlocks, no hidden allocations. Predictable scarcity is what makes a monetary asset credible — and it's why every byte of DGB carries demonstrable, verifiable value over time.
features.trackRecord.title: Twelve years live. Zero downtime.
features.trackRecord.body: Since January 2014 the mainnet has produced blocks every fifteen seconds without interruption. No re-orgs at depth, no governance forks, no emergency hard forks. That uptime, paired with thousands of independently-operated nodes worldwide, is the kind of operational track record critical infrastructure needs — and almost no other chain can show.
chain.title: Native on-chain data.
chain.lead: Pulled directly from the DigiByte network every minute, bypassing all third-party APIs.

tokenomics.title: DigiByte: Sound money for a faster web.
tokenomics.lead: Governed by a strictly predictable monetary policy, DGB is hard-capped at 21 billion coins and operates on a fully transparent emission schedule with a fixed, mathematical distribution.
tokenomics.maxSupply.label: Max supply
tokenomics.blockReward.label: Block reward
tokenomics.emission.label: Emission
tokenomics.premine.label: Premine
digiassets.title: Issue custom assets on a secure UTXO chain.
digiassets.lead: Issue custom digital assets natively on the DigiByte network, from tokens and stablecoins to identity records. Every asset settles in 15 seconds and is secured by a global proof-of-work consensus.
digiassets.step1.title: Pick your asset
digiassets.step1.body: Fungible token, collectible, certificate, voucher — anything mintable on a UTXO base layer.
digiassets.step2.title: Define metadata
digiassets.step2.body: Set name, supply, divisibility and IPFS-anchored metadata so wallets and explorers can render it natively.
digiassets.step3.title: Sign & broadcast
digiassets.step3.body: Pay a few sats of DGB in fees, broadcast the transaction and the asset is live across the network.
digiassets.step4.title: Send anywhere
digiassets.step4.body: Transfer to any DGB address. Embeds in DigiByte Mobile, DigiAssetX, web wallets and explorers out of the box.
digiId.title: Passwordless, open-source authentication.
digiId.lead: Digi-ID relies on decentralized cryptographic signatures instead of traditional passwords, securing user identity without centralized brokers.
digiId.benefit1: Local key storage for absolute privacy.
digiId.benefit3: Drop-in integration for digital and physical access.
digiId.faq1.q: How is it different from OAuth or "Sign in with X"?
digiId.faq1.a: Traditional single sign-on relies on centralized data brokers. Digi-ID is entirely decentralized. Users authenticate by signing a unique challenge directly from their device, removing third-party servers from the process entirely.
digiId.faq2.q: Does it require a cryptocurrency wallet?
digiId.faq2.a: No, holding cryptocurrency is optional. While many DigiByte wallets natively support Digi-ID, users can choose to use a standalone authenticator app designed exclusively for secure logins.
digiId.faq3.a: Developers can use our drop-in libraries for Node.js, PHP, Python, and Go, or install the native WordPress plugin. Full resources are located in the developer hub below.
devhub.title: Uncompromising infrastructure for UTXO development.
devhub.lead: Access a reliable, battle-tested RPC with fixed, predictable fee structures. DigiByte provides the foundation to deploy nodes in minutes and build on a genuinely decentralized network.
devhub.link.core.title: Core protocol
devhub.link.node.title: Run a full node
devhub.link.wiki.title: Wiki & RPC docs
devhub.link.discussions.title: Discussions
devhub.link.integration.title: Integration guide
devhub.link.digiId.title: Digi-ID libraries
devhub.whyShip.point1: Predictable fee markets: sub-cent transaction costs ensure sustainable application scaling.
devhub.whyShip.point2: Approval-free transactions: native UTXO mechanics bypass the security risks associated with broad token allowances.
devhub.whyShip.point3: Stateless execution: a pure UTXO environment allows for simple, parallel, and composable development.
wallets.title: Universal wallet support.
wallets.lead: Manage DGB using industry-standard hardware, mobile, desktop, or web interfaces. The ecosystem provides diverse options to accommodate both long-term cold storage and daily transaction utility.
roadmap.title: Over a decade of continuous execution.
roadmap.lead: From early SegWit activation to multi-algorithm consensus. Every protocol upgrade has been open-source, mainnet-tested, and deployed without centralized funding.
roadmap.genesis.title: Genesis
roadmap.genesis.body: Fair launch via public mining; 0.5% premine distributed for giveaways and development.
roadmap.digishield.title: DigiShield
roadmap.digishield.body: Real-time difficulty re-targeting to ensure stable block times.
roadmap.multialgo.title: MultiAlgo
roadmap.multialgo.body: Five parallel mining algorithms to prevent hashrate centralization.
roadmap.segwit.title: SegWit
roadmap.segwit.body: Protocol upgrade optimizing capacity and fixing transaction malleability.
roadmap.odocrypt.title: Odocrypt & Dandelion++
roadmap.odocrypt.body: ASIC-resistant consensus and privacy-preserving transaction routing.
roadmap.digiAssetsId.title: DigiAssets & Digi-ID
roadmap.digiAssetsId.body: Ecosystem-wide integration for on-chain assets and decentralized authentication.
roadmap.core.title: Core v8.26.2
roadmap.core.body: Modernized node infrastructure built on the Bitcoin Core 26 framework.
roadmap.digidollar.title: DigiDollar
roadmap.digidollar.body: A fully non-custodial stablecoin generating USD-pegged liquidity via time-locked DGB reserves.
community.title: An independent network of global builders.
community.lead: DigiByte is a pure open-source project with no centralized organization. Global development, node infrastructure, and localization across 40+ languages are maintained entirely by self-coordinated volunteers.
community.getInvolved: Get involved: Join the ecosystem by auditing code, localizing documentation, running infrastructure, or producing educational content.
downloads.title: Network software and clients.
downloads.lead: Support the network's decentralized security by running a full validation node, or utilize the light wallet for portable transaction management, asset custody, and secure logins.
downloads.core.subtitle: Complete, independent block validation.
downloads.core.bullet1: Directly anchors and secures the network
downloads.core.bullet2: Built-in SegWit, Bech32, and RPC interfaces
downloads.core.why1: Trustless verification — never rely on a third party's view of the chain.
downloads.core.why2: Strengthen decentralization with every additional peer.
downloads.core.why3: Best-in-class privacy for your own wallets and lookups.
